title: Player Head Locator Bar
description: Replace the dots with player's head in the player locator bar.
body:
# Player Locator Heads

Transform Minecraft’s player locator bar by replacing simple dots with real 2D player heads.

Designed to match the vanilla HUD style, the mod makes multiplayer tracking feel cleaner, more immersive, and easier to read at a glance — all while staying lightweight and performance-friendly.

## Features
- Real-time 2D player heads
- Vanilla-friendly UI design
- Lightweight and optimized
- Seamless HUD integration
- Cleaner multiplayer navigation
```
